MOTION To Reopen Proceedings For Limited Purpose And For Order Approving Distribution Of Remaining Funds To Approved Claimants
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER/APPLICANT INSURANCE COMMISSIONER'S MOTION To Reopen Proceedings For Limited Purpose And For Order Approving Distribution Of Remaining Funds To Approved Claimants.

Insurance Commissioner's motion to reopen proceedings for a limited purpose and approving distribution of remaining funds is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288, email:swong@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
